scope: Sprint 4 hardened sandbox and deterministic failure reproduction

validation.scriptSyntax: passed for all repository MJS scripts and the deterministic fixture
validation.yamlParsing: passed for all GitHub Actions workflows and docker-compose.yml

dependencyAudit.policy: release gate fails on high or critical severity; current moderate findings are upstream transitive dependencies and remain tracked

validation.prismaSchemaValidation: passed via npm run db:generate and raw SQL migrations applied with npm run db:migrate:all
validation.databaseIntegration: incident, role-boundary, sandbox-persistence and sandbox-docker smoke suites passed locally against PostgreSQL 17 and Redis 8
validation.dockerSecurityProfile: deterministic sandbox smoke passed locally against Docker Desktop 4.80.0; orphan check, non-root worker-image check and high/critical Trivy gate are implemented in CI
validation.containerBuilds: Dockerfiles and workflow gates are configured; local image builds were not possible in this environment
validation.remoteExecutionBoundary: production requires a remote authenticated Docker endpoint, rejects local socket execution, transfers source through the Docker client protocol without host bind mounts, and records execution/helper image identities
validation.restrictedEgressAttestation: restricted install networking requires an egress-control label and a destination-policy digest matching the approved registry/domain policy
validation.leaseFencing: all execution-side database mutations require the current unexpired lease owner; duplicate active claims and stale writers are covered by the persistence smoke suite
validation.cleanupSafety: unit-tested for normal completion, timeout, cancellation, control-plane failure, persistence failure and OOM classification; append-only corrective cleanup proofs and stale-execution reconciliation are implemented
validation.resourceSafety: operator limits are ceilings, unsafe stale-resource thresholds are rejected, and source/workspace/output/artifact budgets are bounded

enterpriseGate: closed pending managed remote sandbox infrastructure, mandatory access-control profiles, registry admission, enforced egress gateway, KMS-backed secrets, OIDC and SCIM, evidence object storage, regional resilience, load and container-escape testing, penetration testing and formal operational readiness review
